name: releases-monorepo
description: Internal Claude Code plugin for the buildinternet/releases monorepo — operator skills, managed-agent prompts, and the grader subagent used to develop the Releases.sh registry.

plugins.name: releases-dev
plugins.description: Monorepo developer plugin for buildinternet/releases. Bundles every skill in src/agent/skills/, the discovery/worker/grader subagents, the /releases command, and the hosted MCP connection. Use this when working in the monorepo; end users should install `releases` and `releases-admin` from the buildinternet/releases-cli marketplace instead.
